arts.ttl: When is Leipzig - Liverpool? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: RB Leipzig has had a mixed run, with wins over Mainz 2-0 and Heidenheim 1-0, but a loss to Juventus 2-3. Liverpool has been in excellent form, securing victories against Crystal Palace 1-0, Wolverhampton Wanderers 2-1, and AFC Bournemouth 3-0.
